---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution

How should this feature work? Provide a clear and concise description.

## Research References

Cite academic papers or research that supports this feature:

- [Author et al., Year] Paper title. Conference/Journal.
- [Author et al., Year] Paper title. Conference/Journal.

## Use Cases

Describe concrete scenarios where this feature would be useful:

1. **Scenario 1**: ...
2. **Scenario 2**: ...

## Alternatives Considered

What alternative approaches have you considered?

## Implementation Details (Optional)

If you have implementation ideas, describe them here:

- Affected components: [e.g., Population, Evaluator, Evolution]
- API changes: ...
- Configuration changes: ...

## Compatibility

How does this affect existing functionality?

- [ ] Backward compatible
- [ ] Requires breaking changes
- [ ] Requires new dependencies

## Willingness to Contribute

- [ ] I am willing to collaborate on implementing this feature
- [ ] I can provide research references and theoretical analysis
- [ ] I can help with testing and validation

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information, diagrams, or examples.

---

**Note**: Feature requests for core algorithm changes require theoretical justification and prior discussion. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for guidelines.
